style_authority.note: Anchors motion to calm high-frequency operational use, direct manipulation, context preservation, and predictable state changes.

reference_selection.note: Uses the relevant motion-quality, interaction-physics, performance, accessibility, and validation contracts only.

anti_generic_redesign.note: Explicitly limits motion to feedback, tracking, settle, and state continuity rather than adding spectacle.

evidence_level.note: Calls the review static-code-only and avoids claiming observed smoothness, frame rate, touch feel, or Reduced Motion behavior.

verified_boundary.note: Lists exact code facts separately from runtime hypotheses for lag, WAAPI/CSS interaction, touch, responsiveness, and event loss.

design_moves.note: Provides grab-offset tracking, capture, presentation-value interruption, px/s velocity handoff, projected snaps, soft bounds, and Reduced Motion.

scope_control.note: Stays focused, actionable, read-only, and within the 150-line budget.
